docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SOFIA REYES, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $660.40 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT WAGONER, ART ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-23-2020 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. REPRESENTED BY SOFIA REYES, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ART WAGONER IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
